subcodes.first_line: O thou who art present before the Wronged One! To turn towards Iran is well-pleasing and acceptable. Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الحاضر لدی المظلوم توجه بسمت ایران احب و مقبول قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God
